name: JetBrains AI Assistant v261
description: Latest version of JetBrains AI Assistant plugin (v261.22158.131) with updated AI features for JetBrains IDEs including enhanced code completion, refactoring, and debugging assistance.

name: Databricks Genie Code
description: An autonomous AI agent for data teams that builds pipelines, debugs failures, ships dashboards, and maintains production systems. Represents agentic engineering applied to data work with autonomous production system capabilities.
community_quotes: The launch of Databricks Genie Code feels like more than just another feature release
Raises fundamental questions about the data industry
Genie Code turns data engineering, data science and analytics ideas into autonomous production systems
2025 was the year everyone talked about AI agents. 2026 is when they actually showed up for work

name: Junie CLI
description: JetBrains' LLM-agnostic coding agent CLI that handles tasks autonomously or collaboratively with developers. Features one-click migration from other agents and vendor-neutral infrastructure supporting multiple models.
community_quotes: The tool is pretty solid and smart, but it's really really slow in comparison with the other tools
Pretty unusable for any serious heavy lifting due to performance issues
Produces poor results with broad, vague prompts
LLM-agnostic approach and vendor neutrality are key differentiators

name: Opsera AppSec AI Agents
description: AI agents for security, compliance, architecture, and CI/CD workflows that power the shift from traditional SDLC to AI-SDLC with autonomous DevSecOps capabilities.
community_quotes: Powering the shift from traditional SDLC to AI-SDLC

name: JetBrains Air
description: An agentic development environment (agentic IDE) built on JetBrains' abandoned Fleet IDE project. Allows developers to control multiple AI agents simultaneously with support for OpenAI Codex, Claude Agent, Gemini CLI, and Junie.
community_quotes: Air launches as public preview – a new wave of dev tooling
Built on the corpse of abandoned Fleet
Agentic AI development with multiple AI agent control

name: VS Code 1.111 Autopilot
description: Microsoft's VS Code 1.111 release introduces Autopilot preview mode for autonomous AI agent workflows, agent permissions system with three approval modes, agent-scoped hooks, and agent plugins marketplace. First release under new weekly stable schedule.
community_quotes: Autopilot actually completes tasks end-to-end
First release under new weekly stable release schedule
Can handle blocking questions that would stop other AI assistants
Agent permissions system gives developers control over autonomy levels
Exploded (went viral) with strong reactions about revolutionizing coding workflows

name: Cursor Agentic Coding System
description: A major upgrade to Cursor's AI IDE that enables autonomous planning and execution of multi-step programming tasks. Represents the 'third era' of AI software development with self-driving codebase capabilities, long-running background agents, and demo/video outputs.
community_quotes: The ceiling raiser I've been waiting for
Paying for Claude Max, ChatGPT Pro, and Cursor Pro+ - some of the best money I spend anywhere
System peaked at over 1,000 commits per hour across hundreds of agents
More fun reviewing ideas than reviewing code
Shows demos rather than just code diffs, agents can use the software they build
